title: Le monde de Fred
overview: Do you like soccer? Do you like theater? Then you've got it! Lorànt Deutsch has come up with a revolutionary concept for our hero Fred, a frustrated film director who dreams of becoming a writer. In the meantime, he's doing a series of increasingly conventional and unsurprising interviews with footballers for sports channels. His love life is hardly more satisfying. He goes from conquest to conquest, refusing to be tied down. A blurred, disjointed daily routine. Until the day Fleur, more friend than conquest, tells him she's accidentally pregnant with his child. He had dreamed of being a producer, director or TV presenter. But never as a father.
